titleStmt.title: SII 22.364: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 364. (A.R. No. 364 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, KUḌUMIYĀMALAI. ŚIKHĀNĀTHASVĀMI TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶADĒVA—35th YEAR

summary.p: The inscription is said to have been copied over in the 3rd year of Sundara-Pāṇḍyadēva from its original position on the wall and tiers on the north side of the davaṉa-maṇḍapa, as in its place a new maṇḍapa had to be erected to enshrine the god Tirunaṭṭapperumāṉ. The order for this recopy is said to have been issued by the officer (?) Poṉṉaṉ Gāṅgēyaṉ of Āṟṟūr the (the same who figures in No 362 above), on Mārgaḻi, ba. 5, Saturday, Makhā (= A.D. 1218, December 9. The day happens to be Sunday.)

This records an undertaking given by the Poṟkōyil-kaikkōḷa soldiers of the three regiments of Kōnāḍu alias Iraṭṭapāḍikoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, to the temple at Tirunalakkuṉṟam in Kuṉṟiśūḻ-nāḍu to collect among themselves every year a specified quantity of paddy required for the several items of daily worship and offerings to God Kaikkōḷa Nāyakar and his consort consecrated by them in the temple, and an amount of 25 Kāśu for the expenses of the tiruppāvāḍai-amudu offerings to the deities on the three occasions of festival in the temple in the months of Mārgaḻi, Māśi and Paṅguṉi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . Ikkalveṭṭu muṉṉāḷil Ittirukkoyilil tavaṉa maṇṭapattu vaṭapāricattum cekatiyilum kumutattilum veṭṭikkiṭanta kalveṭṭāṉa Iṭam tūra
ttu māṟpaṭa Iṭṭu tiruṉaṭṭapperumāṉ Eḻuntaruḷi Irukkat tiru maṇṭapañ ceyya veṇṭukaiyāl kalveṭṭuppaṭi Eṭuttu cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 3vatu mārka
ḻimātattu Aparapakṣattu ca(ṉ)ṉikkiḻamaipeṟṟa makamum pañcamiyum peṟṟa Aṉṟu kalveṭṭuppaṭi yeṭuttapaṭiye Āṟṟūruṭaiyāṉ poṉṉaṉ kāṅkeyaṉ
veṉṟu colla veṭṭiṉapaṭiyāvatu . svastiśrī . tiri puvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 5vatu koṉāṭāṉa Iraṭṭapāṭi koṇ
ṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu muṉṟupaṭai poṟkoyil kaikkoḷarom Iṉṉāṭu kuṉṟicūḻnāṭṭu tirunalakkuṉṟam Uṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil nāṅkaḷ Eḻun taruḷivit
kaiykkoḷanāyakarum tampirāṭṭiyārkkun tiru Amutu ceytaruḷa Ittevar koyilil cūlakkālāl nāḷ Oṉṟukku canti Oṉṟukku tiru Amutu Arici nāṉāḻiyā
ka canti muṉṟukku Arici tūṇi nāṉāḻiyum tampirāṭṭiyāṟku canti Oṉṟukku Arici Irunāḻiyāka Arici Aṟunāḻiyum Āka nāḷ Oṉṟukku Arici patakku Irunāḻi yum Aiñ
ciraṇṭāka nellu Aiṅkuṟuṇi Aiññāḻiyum kaṟiyamutukkum miḷakamutukkum neyyamutukkum Aṭaikkāyamutukkum nellu kuṟuṇi Eḻu nāḻiyum mattiyāṉa cantikkuc
coṟu Iraṇṭukku nellu kuṟuṇi muṉṉāḻiyum kalam Iṭuṅkucavaṉukku [ nāḷ 1- k] ku nellu Irunāḻiyum viṟakiṭu māṉukku nellu Irunāḻiyum Āka nāḷ 1- kku
nellu nta nilattukkum mārkaḻiyum māciyum paṅkuṉiyum tiruviḻā Eḻuntaruḷum nāḷ muṉṟukku veṇṭum pala Aḻivukku Ittevar Ūrkaḷil tiru
ppāvāṭaikku vai(k)ykkuṅ kācu 2 10 5- m Eṅkaḷ kaṇakku vār Āṇṭutoṟum Eṟaṭṭukkoṇṭu cantirātittavaṟ celuttak kaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi kuṭuttom mu
ṉṟu paṭaik kaikkoḷarom Ittaṉmam nilainiṟuttuvār cipātaṅkaḷ Eṅkaḷ talaimelaṉa Ittukkut tivuvaḻi Aṟuvār Itu nāṭṭār rakṣai Itu paṉmahe
śvararakṣai
Digital edition of SII 22.364 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
